name: Tomato and Rice Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the rice in the butter in a frying pan until the rice is golden brown. Transfer to the crock pot.
2. Pour the tomato liquid, tomatoes, parsley, salt and pepper into the crock pot and mix well.
3. Cover and cook on low setting (200°F - 100°C) for six to eight hours.
4. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and chopped chives before serving.
